texto: To abandon language is to stop/creating a place other than your own life/in which to live. It is to enter/the terrible certainty of the flesh. Even god/is only possible through language.
explicacao: Citação de Jude Nutter sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “To abandon language is to stop/creating a place other than your own life/in which to live. It is …” articula reflexao, language, abandon em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
